rubric_lines.name: Code Review (NEW at SE-II)
rubric_lines.description: Reviews code of other SE-Is and SE-IIs
rubric_lines.se2_bar: Reviews PRs from peers; substantive (not rubber-stamp)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥10 substantive 3rd-party reviews per half across ≥3 distinct authors and ≥2 repos

rubric_lines.name: LLD ownership (NEW at SE-II)
rubric_lines.description: Designs code abstractions, DB schemas, includes analytics
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥3 user-owned LLDs per half, each wired to ≥1 merged PR

data_source.query: owner = 'vashistha.garg@clear.in' AND (title contains 'LLD' OR title contains 'design') AND modifiedTime >= '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z'

rubric_lines.name: Testing (drives coverage)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥3 user-driven coverage initiatives per half with measurable delta

rubric_lines.name: Debugging team's code (not just own)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥6 substantive cross-author debugs per half (Slack first-replies in #einvoice-l3-support, #einv-devs)

rubric_lines.name: Mentoring SE-Is (NEW at SE-II)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥2 named mentees per half with ≥10 documented touchpoints each

rubric_lines.name: Influence engineers on LLD (NEW at SE-II)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥4 Slack threads per half pushing back on a design where the design changes in a follow-up PR

rubric_lines.name: Communication clarity (broadcast + RCAs)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥3 RCAs per half + ≥1 broadcast post per quarter in #einv-devs or wider

rubric_lines.name: Hiring panels (NEW at SE-II)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥4 hiring panels per half + ≥4 written feedback notes
rubric_lines.blocker: Manager confirmation needed (Q1 in §7 of plan) — eligibility may be gated to SE-II-confirmed engineers only

rubric_lines.name: Customer Understanding (NEW at SE-II)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥4 customer-named investigations per half (JIRA + Slack referencing specific customer workflows)

data_source.filter: text contains any of: MAF, Tabby, Mitsuba, Swiggy, Eicher

rubric_lines.name: Product Metrics (NEW at SE-II)
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥3 evidence-points per half citing concrete numbers (failure %, p99, GMV, IRN/EWB volume)

rubric_lines.name: AI Competency Level (target L4)
rubric_lines.threshold_l4: ≥3 features with quantified before/after time + ≥1 published workflow doc + ≥1 multi-step agent workflow live

rubric_lines.name: Delivery Timeliness
rubric_lines.threshold: ≥85% on-time delivery at SE-II expanded scope (resolved <= duedate)

data_source.jql: assignee = currentUser() AND resolved >= -90d AND duedate is not EMPTY

deferred_ayush_questions: Hiring eligibility — am I being put on hiring panels at SE-II level, or gated to SE-II-confirmed engineers only?
Mentoring definition — does PM mentoring count, or strictly SE-I engineer mentoring?
AI competency target — L4 or sustained L3?
Test coverage SLO — what % is the team SLO?
LLD format — Confluence template, Drive template, or PR-embedded?
Code review volume — is ≥10 substantive 3rd-party per half right? Or % of own PR volume?
Influence measurement — sufficient to show design changed, or need explicit acknowledgment?
Production Deployment SE-II shift — real expectation to manage own deploys?
Framework 'live' definition — first onboard, first go-live, or sustained 30 days?
notes: Initialized 2026-04-28. Thresholds are best-guess defaults from criteria-extraction agent's Section D. Refine when Ayush answers the deferred questions.
